title: BarRelease
description: BarRelease: Defines the releases at the start and end node of a Bar.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

StartRelease.description: Release of the start node of the bar, in the local coordinates of the element. Constraint6DOF: Constraint objects with six degrees of freedom, three translational and three rotational, used for supports and bar end releases.

EndRelease.description: Release of the end node of the bar, in the local coordinates of the element. Constraint6DOF: Constraint objects with six degrees of freedom, three translational and three rotational, used for supports and bar end releases.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
